goal: submodule_subset[R, M](module_hom_kernel[R, M, N](g), module_hom_kernel[R, M, K](h)) = forall(x0: M) { module_hom_kernel[R, M, N](g).contains(x0) implies module_hom_kernel[R, M, K](h).contains(x0) }

goal: kernel_h.carrier = kernel_g.carrier and submodule_subset[R, M](kernel_h, kernel_g) and submodule_subset[R, M](kernel_g, kernel_h)
